title: Modium
description: Modium improves vanilla Minecraft with lightweight quality-of-life mods, making it smoother and more convenient without changing the core game
body:
# Modium

> *A smoother vanilla experience with just the right extras*

Modium is a modpack built for players who want a better vanilla experience without adding complexity. Based on the performance improvements from Far Beyond, Modium introduces carefully selected quality-of-life mods to make Minecraft smoother, more practical, and more enjoyable while staying true to the original game.

## Who is it for?
Any player who wants improved gameplay, better performance, and quality-of-life features while keeping a vanilla-like experience.

## Features
- Optimization
- Optifine-compatible resource packs
- Extended render distance
- Shader support (Complementary Shaders)
- Quality of life improvements
- Enhanced textures
- Better sounds
- Voice chat


## My Other Modpacks
Not sure if this one is the perfect fit? Here’s how it compares to the others in the same series:
| Icon | Name | Optimization | Far View | Quality of life | Advanced Tools |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AzLasq6X/1d4b447fd709b5ef811e1c8fdc27074278159d7c_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/project/AzLasq6X) | Far Beyond ([link](https://modrinth.com/project/AzLasq6X)) | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>❌</center> | <center>❌</center> |
| [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2xZHpnEE/8c0edcd2820ea5e4de9dd3656c44242ccbf098cf_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/project/2xZHpnEE) | **Modium** (here) | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>❌</center> |
| [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QEcvhAB4/817a067ceb4198885b14c6b50fa79ebca3ca1581_96.webp)](https://modrinth.com/project/QEcvhAB4) | **Modium Pro** ([link](https://modrinth.com/project/QEcvhAB4)) | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> | <center>✅</center> |

**Optimization**: Tweaks and performance mods that make Minecraft run faster and smoother, without altering visuals or gameplay in any way

**Far View**: See terrain far beyond the vanilla render distance, with better performance thanks to simplified detail, and full support for multiplayer and shaders

**Quality of Life**: Adds small, non-intrusive features that enhance comfort, usability, and gameplay flow while preserving the vanilla experience

**Advanced Tools**: Includes creative and technical tools for experienced players such as builders, mapmakers, content creators, and redstone engineers
